allow: PowerShell($basePath = "C:\\Users\\papao\\Downloads\\Servicios Profesionales"; if \(Test-Path $basePath\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $basePath -Force -Recurse -File | Select-Object -Property @{Name="Path";Expression={$_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\($basePath\)}}, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { "Directory does not exist" })

PowerShell($basePath = "C:\\Users\\papao\\Downloads\\Servicios Profesionales"; Get-ChildItem -Path $basePath -Force | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Name = $_.Name; Type = if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "Folder" } else { "File" }; Size = if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "-" } else { $_.Length }; Created = $_.CreationTime } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== DIRECTORY STRUCTURE ===" ; $basePath = "C:\\Users\\papao\\Downloads\\Servicios Profesionales" ; Write-Host "Root directory: $basePath" ; Write-Host "`nTotal items: $\(\(Get-ChildItem -Path $basePath -Force -Recurse\).Count\)" ; Write-Host "`n=== TOP-LEVEL CONTENTS ===" ; Get-ChildItem -Path $basePath -Force | ForEach-Object { if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { Write-Host "📁 $\($_.Name\)/" } else { Write-Host "📄 $\($_.Name\) \($\($_.Length\) bytes\)" } })

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== FILES IN .claude SUBDIRECTORY ===" ; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\papao\\Downloads\\Servicios Profesionales\\.claude" -Force | ForEach-Object { if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { Write-Host "📁 $\($_.Name\)/" } else { Write-Host "📄 $\($_.Name\) \($\($_.Length\) bytes\)" } })
Bash(python scripts/search.py "premium cleaning service home boutique editorial minimal" --design-system -p "ServiYa")
